purpose: Machine-readable inspection contract for the external native Figma source/prototype step.
claim_boundary: This checklist is not native Figma evidence. It defines what must be inspected after the Figma Desktop plugin or Figma MCP creates a .fig/.figjam file or verified Figma URL.

required_pages.name: EvidencePlatform Tokens
required_pages.pass_criteria: Color tokens are visible as editable Figma nodes, native paint/text/effect styles and color variables exist when supported, and values match design-tokens.json.

required_pages.name: EvidencePlatform Components
required_pages.pass_criteria: Component masters are editable; GateCard and OptionAction variants are available as component sets when supported; PASS_WITH_RISKS/BLOCK and real-tool action boundaries remain visible.

required_pages.name: EvidencePlatform Design System Spec
required_pages.pass_criteria: Typography, spacing, color roles, and responsive shell rules are documented on-canvas.

required_pages.name: EvidencePlatform Prototype
required_pages.pass_criteria: Desktop/tablet/mobile frames exist and the P0-P3 stage hierarchy is readable.

required_pages.name: EvidencePlatform Interactive Flow
required_pages.pass_criteria: Prototype flow markers exist; if Figma reactions are supported, key actions are wired and BLOCK does not advance.

required_pages.name: EvidencePlatform Motion System
required_pages.pass_criteria: Motion states explain risk and block behavior without implying fake computation or scientific validity.

required_pages.name: EvidencePlatform Developer Handoff
required_markers: Source of Truth / app.py and tools.py
required_pages.pass_criteria: Handoff page states that app.py/tools.py remain the source of truth and no second frontend is introduced.

required_pages.name: EvidencePlatform Acceptance Evidence
required_pages.pass_criteria: Acceptance evidence page makes the remaining native save/export and receipt registration requirement explicit.

required_pages.name: EvidencePlatform Native Inspection Checklist
required_pages.pass_criteria: The native inspection checklist is visible on-canvas so reviewers can inspect the Figma file without switching back to JSON.

prototype_checks: No action chip represents a workflow that is absent from app.py/tools.py
motion_checks: Loading animation is only described for real tool execution
No fake progress animation is introduced
source_of_truth_checks: Workflow actions map back to app.py/tools.py
Figma artifact does not claim scientific/model validity
Design handoff references docs/figma_handoff and docs/UI_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md
forbidden_claims_until_registered: UI evidence proves model or scientific validity
